messages.routingTargetsLoadError: Marshrutlash uchun raqamlar va guruhlarni yuklab bo'lmadi

routing.infoTitle: Qoidalar ustuvorlik bo'yicha ishlaydi: raqam qancha kichik bo'lsa, shuncha oldin tekshiriladi.
routing.infoDescription: Patternlar RegExp formatida beriladi. Bu blok qoidalarni brauzerda saqlaydi va dialplan patternlarini oldindan sozlash uchun mos.
routing.empty: Hozircha patternlar yo'q. Birinchi qoidani qo'shing.
routing.targetsHint: Marshrutlash yo'nalishlari ichki raqamlar va guruhlar ro'yxatidan olinadi.

connectionHelp.title: Nimani to'ldirish kerak?
connectionHelp.description: Provider = faqat Asterisk. Type = PBX yoki SIP. Number = chiquvchi qo'ng'iroq uchun ichki yoki tashqi raqam. Caller ID = mijoz ko'radigan raqam.

validation.pbxNumberFormat: For PBX use extension (2-10 symbols: digits, *, #)
validation.voipNumberFormat: For external number use international format, e.g. +998901234567

routeModes.embedded: CRM qo'ng'iroqlarni o'zi boshqaradigan o'rnatilgan Asterisk orqali yo'naltiradi.
routeModes.bridge: CRM qo'ng'iroqlarni tashqi Asterisk PBX bridge orqali yo'naltiradi.

fields.routeModeExtra: Qo'ng'iroqlarni o'rnatilgan Asterisk yoki tashqi bridge orqali yo'naltirishni tanlang.
fields.stunTooltip: One per line or comma-separated. Example: stun:stun.l.google.com:19302
fields.stunExtra: Needed to determine WebRTC client network route.
fields.turnRelayExtra: Recommended for users behind NAT/CGNAT and corporate networks.
fields.connectionTypeExtra: PBX: o'rnatilgan Asterisk ichki raqami. SIP: SIP serverli tashqi Asterisk trunk/account.
fields.callerIdExtra: Odatda kompaniya tashqi raqami bilan bir xil bo'ladi.

telephony.title: Telefoniya sozlamalari
telephony.agentSettingsDescription: Only personal call settings are configured here. System SIP/WebRTC and routing are managed by admin in Integrations -> Telephony.
telephony.pbxTooltip: Your internal phone number in the system
telephony.pbxExtra: Example: 101, 7477. Main number for internal calls.
telephony.displayNameExtra: If empty, profile name is used.

validation.validWsUri: To'g'ri WebSocket URI kiriting (ws:// yoki wss://)
validation.validSipUri: To'g'ri SIP URI kiriting (sip: yoki sips:)
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
